# Bunny Calculator - LLM Context
Title: Bunny Calculator
Description: A free suite of professional financial calculators
Base URL: https://finance.bunnycalculator.com

## Site Overview
Bunny Calculator is a 100% free, browser-based financial planning application for retail investors. It requires no authentication and stores no user data on external servers. All calculations are executed dynamically in the client-side browser using industry-standard mathematical formulas.

## Available Calculators Context
- /sip : Systematic Investment Plan calculator using continuous annuity compounding.
- /cagr : Compound Annual Growth Rate calculator.
- /emi : Equated Monthly Installment loan and mortgage calculator.
- /rule-of-72 : Mental math estimation calculator for doubling money.
- /stock-average : Calculates weighted average down pricing for multiple stock purchases.
- /stock-profit-loss : Exact net profit/loss and R:R calculator for individual trades.
- /stock-split : Calculator for adjusting share count and price after a corporate forward or reverse split.
- /bonus-share : Adjusts share capitalization and counts post-bonus issue.
- /lumpsum : Compounding future value calculator for single one-time deposits.
- /percentage : Standard mathematical percentage evaluation formulas.

## Educational Content
The site additionally provides deep-dive educational definitions located at:
- /face-value : Information on Face Value splits and corporate demergers.
- /bonus-buyback : Comparisons and analysis of Stock Bonuses versus Share Buybacks.
- /dividend-details : Explaining ex-dividend dates, record dates, and dividend yields.
- /trading-holidays : The 2026 chronological calendar for US and Indian stock market closures.
